overview.description: Cloud consulting and AI development firm offering cloud architecture, application development, AI/ML solutions, DevOps, and cloud security
overview.description_long: CLOUDFIELD a.s. is a Prague-based cloud and AI consultancy that designs and delivers cloud architecture (Azure, AWS, GCP), custom AI tools (including 'AI BROS' and 'DOC BRO' for document intelligence), ML/LLM integrations, DevOps automation, containerisation (Kubernetes), and cloud security services. The team works embedded with client organisations as long-term engineering partners rather than one-off vendors.
overview.tagline: Ovládáme cloudy, inovujeme s AI a vyvíjíme aplikace

history.origin_story: Founded in June 2019 in Prague as an a.s. (joint-stock company) focused on cloud consulting and later expanding into AI/ML development

key_milestones.event: Launched AI BROS product suite and AI Dev Transformation programme for enterprise customers

awards: Microsoft Solutions Partner – Data & AI Azure
Microsoft Solutions Partner – Digital & App Innovation

metadata.notes: Czech a.s. (joint-stock company) registered 2019-06-20. LinkedIn shows ~44 employees (11-50 range). Offices listed on careers page: Praha, České Budějovice, Hradec Králové, Plzeň, Olomouc plus remote. No public funding data found. Primary revenue model is B2B consulting/managed services; AI BROS/DOC BRO appear to be proprietary product offerings alongside consulting.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Consulting/services model is highly vulnerable as AI tools enable clients to do work in-house.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Established customer base with proven market demand.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No public funding information. Sustainability unclear.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Mixed risk profile — some protective factors but also significant vulnerabilities.
